                        /speak 7A.Ebony "D-darkiepoo...?!"
                        /speak 7A.Ebony "You- You bird-brain, you had better get up!$a"
                        /speak 7A.Darkness "Uuhggh..."
                        /speak 7A.Darkness "Where... Oh, right. The lair."
                        /speak 7A.Ebony "I told you those crows were too far gone to be saved! Gah! You never listen, you stubborn bird."
                        /speak 7A.Darkness "Ebony..."
                        /speak 7A.Ebony "I was so worried- I... I'm so glad you're okay-#$b#You... you don't look so good."
                        /speak 7A.Darkness "I don't feel so good, but I will be alright... I still have my mind."
                        /speak 7A.Darkness "Thank you for coming to my aid. My ego got the better of me."
                        /speak 7A.Darkness "Ugh..."
                        /speak 7A.Ebony "Darkiepoo-! Crow-friend, Darkness needs a safe place to rest... can he stay with you for a while?"

                        /speak 7A.Ebony "Thank you, thank you, thank you-"
                        /speak 7A.Darkness "Guh..."
                        /speak 7A.Ebony "Darkness-"
                        /speak 7A.Darkness "Thank you, crow-friend. I will not take advantage of your kindness."
                        /speak 7A.Darkness "Take this amulet. I will come to your aid when you call."

                        /speak 7A.Ebony "Why you- He's hurt, he needs-"
                        /speak 7A.Darkness "Guh..."
                        /speak 7A.Ebony "Darkness!"
                        /speak 7A.Darkness "Enough, Ebony. Respect the space of our ally. It's more than enough that this kind soul came to our aid in the first place."
                        /speak 7A.Ebony "I- But- Sigh. I suppose you're right."
                        /speak 7A.Darkness "Take this amulet. I will come to your aid when you call."

                    /end
